summary: Recent updates to the Media Source Extensions (MSE) in Firefox enhance the testing and logging capabilities for handling video content. The introduction of a new generator script facilitates the testing of HEVC (High Efficiency Video Coding) video formats, which are important for delivering high-quality video with less data usage. Additionally, by utilizing **MOZ_LOG_FMT** for logging, developers can better track and diagnose media playback issues, ensuring a smoother viewing experience for users. These improvements underscore Firefox's ongoing commitment to optimizing performance and supporting modern video standards.
